{{Short description|2025 film festival in Berlin, Germany}} {{Infobox Film festival|name=75th Berlin International Film Festival|image=75th_Berlin_International_Film_Festival_poster.jpg|caption=Official festival poster|opening=''[[The Light (2025 film)|The Light]]''|closing=|location=[[Berlin]], Germany|founded=1951|awards=[[Golden Bear]]:
''[[Dreams (Sex Love)]]''|host=|artistic_director=[[Tricia Tuttle]]|directors=|number=|date=Opening: {{Start date|2025|2|13|df=y}}
Closing: {{End date|2025|2|23|df=y}}|website={{URL|http://www.berlinale.de}}|main=[[Berlin International Film Festival]]|previous=[[74th Berlin International Film Festival|74th]]|next=[[76th Berlin International Film Festival|76th]]}} The '''75th annual Berlin International Film Festival''', usually called the '''Berlinale''', took place between 13 and 23 February 2025 in [[Berlin]], Germany. American filmmaker [[Todd Haynes]] was named the Jury President for the main competition.{{Cite web |last=Maglio |first=Tony |date=November 14, 2024 |title=Todd Haynes Is President of 2025 Berlin Film Festival Jury |url=https://www.indiewire.com/news/breaking-news/todd-haynes-berlin-2025-jury-president-1235065779/ |access-date=November 15, 2024 |website=[[IndieWire]] |language=en-US}} It marked the first edition of [[Tricia Tuttle]] as the festival's artistic director after [[Carlo Chatrian]] and Mariette Rissenbeek stepped down after the 2024 edition.{{Cite news |last=Roxborough |first=Scott |date=2023-09-02 |title=Berlin Film Festival Artistic Director Carlo Chatrian to Step Down After 2024 Edition |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/berlin-film-festival-director-carlo-chatrain-step-down-2024-1235580707/ |access-date=2024-02-26 |work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]] |language=en-US}} ''[[Dreams (Sex Love)]]'' directed by [[Dag Johan Haugerud]] won the [[Golden Bear]]. The [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]] was awarded to ''[[The Blue Trail]]'' by [[Gabriel Mascaro]]. While the [[Silver Bear for Best Leading Performance]] was awarded to [[Rose Byrne]] for ''[[If I Had Legs I'd Kick You]].''{{Cite web |title=The Prizes of the International Jury |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/festival/awards-and-juries/international-jury.html |access-date=2025-02-22 |website=www.berlinale.de |language=en}} The festival opened with German drama film ''[[The Light (2025 film)|The Light]]'' by [[Tom Tykwer]].{{Cite web |last=Roxborough |first=Scott |date=5 December 2024 |title=Tom Tykwer's 'The Light' to Open 2025 Berlin Film Festival |url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/tom-tykwer-new-film-the-light-to-open-2025-berlin-festival-1236078243/ |access-date=12 December 2024 |website=[[The Hollywood Reporter]]}} During the opening ceremony, British actress [[Tilda Swinton]] was awarded the [[Honorary Golden Bear]]. == Juries == {{Multiple image | perrow = 2 | total_width = 350 | image1 = Todd Haynes MFF 2023.jpg | image2 = International Jury of Berlinale 2025.jpg | direction = horizontal | caption1 = Main competition jury president [[Todd Haynes]] | caption2 = Main competition jury members |
